result.stderr:
USAGE: flux-sdk [--help] [--version] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    build <options>       Compile ProtoGraph into a Resonite record
    parse-record <options>
                          Reads and convert a Resonite record (.brson) into
                          human readable JSON
    froox-docs <options>  Reflects Froox engine metadata and writs information
                          about protoflux nodes and other types to a file
    lsp <options>         Start the ProtoGraph language server using the
                          Language Server Protocol
    style <options>       Style source files into Resonite markup with syntax
                          highlighting
    pack <options>        Pack the contents of this project into a
                          distributable ProtoGraph package
    restore <options>     Install all ProtoGraph dependencies of this project
                          required to compile
    clean <options>       Remove dependency related files
    init <options>        Create a new ProtoGraph project template in the
                          current directory
    new <options>         Create a new ProtoGraph project in a new sub-directory

    Use 'flux-sdk <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --version             Show the current Flux SDK version
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: flux-sdk [--help] [--version] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    build <options>       Compile ProtoGraph into a Resonite record
    parse-record <options>
                          Reads and convert a Resonite record (.brson) into
                          human readable JSON
    froox-docs <options>  Reflects Froox engine metadata and writs information
                          about protoflux nodes and other types to a file
    lsp <options>         Start the ProtoGraph language server using the
                          Language Server Protocol
    style <options>       Style source files into Resonite markup with syntax
                          highlighting
    pack <options>        Pack the contents of this project into a
                          distributable ProtoGraph package
    restore <options>     Install all ProtoGraph dependencies of this project
                          required to compile
    clean <options>       Remove dependency related files
    init <options>        Create a new ProtoGraph project template in the
                          current directory
    new <options>         Create a new ProtoGraph project in a new sub-directory

    Use 'flux-sdk <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --version             Show the current Flux SDK version
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stderr:
USAGE: flux-sdk build [--help] [--out <path>] [--out-dir <path>]
                      [--project-directory <path>] [--pack-to <format>]
                      [--watch] [--glob] [--library-path <path>]
                      [--template-path <path>] [--parse-debug <path>]
                      [--component-debug <path>] [--graphviz-debug <path>]
                      [--record-debug <path>] [--stop-after-parse]
                      [--stop-after-resolve] [--compact-error-messages]
                      [--layout-engine <builtin|graphviz>] [--skip-restore]
                      [--profile <string>]
                      [--optimization-preset <fast|dev|release|allunstable>]
                      [--optimization=<string>] [--no-default-assets]
                      [--skip-unmodified] [<path>...]

SOURCE:

    <path>...             Source file(s) to process. Separate .pg file names by
                          spaces. Glob patterns supported. Each file fill be
                          compiled separately as its own main module.

OPTIONS:

    --out, -o <path>      File to write output to. Defaults to '<source>.brson'
    --out-dir <path>      When compiling multiple source files, write all
                          output .brson files to this directory.
    --project-directory, -d <path>
                          Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
                          modules will be resolved. The current directory by
                          default.
    --pack-to <format>    The format to pack to: 'moduprint' (default). The
                          template specified must be the be the correct style
                          (check the template name).
    --watch               Will watch the ProtoGraph file for changes and
                          recompile when detected.
    --glob                Interpret the source files using glob patterns
                          relative to the project directory
    --library-path, -L <path>
                          Manually specify a directory to search for the
                          ProtoFlux DLLs at runtime for reflection. You an also
                          set the RESONITE_MANAGED_DATA_PATH environment
                          variable instead of specifying this command line
                          argument. Use this if your Resonite files are
                          installed in a non-standard location or you want to
                          use a different set of DLLs.
    --template-path, -t <path>
                          Path to Resonite record (.brson) to use as a template
                          for packing the ProtoFlux into
    --parse-debug <path>  File to write AST intermediate format to
    --component-debug <path>
                          File to write node IL to
    --graphviz-debug <path>
                          File to write the graphviz dot file to. Only
                          applicable when the graphviz layout engine is used
    --record-debug <path> File to write the Resonite record to as JSON (in
                          addition to the .brson bundle)
    --stop-after-parse    Stop the compilation after the ProtoGraph files are
                          parsed into a syntactic AST. Errors from bad syntax
                          will be reported, but few to no semantic errors will
                          be reported.
    --stop-after-resolve  Stop the compilation after the ProtoGraph program has
                          been lowered into components (IR). All compiler
                          errors will still be reported, but the program will
                          not layout nodes nor produce a packed .brson record.
    --compact-error-messages
                          Format compiler error messages to the console so that
                          they are easier to parse for an IDE. They will be
                          formatted as a 'mostly' single line, but lines after
                          the first in error messages will not be included on
                          the first line.
    --layout-engine <builtin|graphviz>
                          Engine to use to layout ProtoFlux nodes. 'builtin'
                          using the GraphShape libary and 'graphviz' (default).
    --skip-restore        Do not restore package dependencies. Only build. Only
                          applies if a protograph.toml file is in the root of
                          the project.
    --profile <string>    Compiler build profiles. fast, dev, release, and
                          allUnsafe are included by default. If not specified,
                          dev is used.
    --optimization-preset <fast|dev|release|allunstable>
                          Apply a different optimization preset than normal
    --optimization, -O=<string>
                          Comma separated list of compiler optimizations to
                          perform. Prefix an optimization with 'no' to disable
                          it. Overrides the profile optimizations.
    --no-default-assets   Do not include default assets in the packed record.
                          This includes the slot templates, heap and various
                          dynamic variables.
    --skip-unmodified, -S Don't recompile source files if they and all of their
                          dependencies have not changed. This will NOT
                          recompile modules that have errors unless they have
                          been modified.
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: flux-sdk build [--help] [--out <path>] [--out-dir <path>]
                      [--project-directory <path>] [--pack-to <format>]
                      [--watch] [--glob] [--library-path <path>]
                      [--template-path <path>] [--parse-debug <path>]
                      [--component-debug <path>] [--graphviz-debug <path>]

                      [--stop-after-resolve] [--compact-error-messages]

                      [--profile <string>]
                      [--optimization-preset <fast|dev|release|allunstable>]
                      [--optimization=<string>] [--no-default-assets]
                      [--skip-unmodified] [<path>...]

SOURCE:

    <path>...             Source file(s) to process. Separate .pg file names by
                          spaces. Glob patterns supported. Each file fill be
                          compiled separately as its own main module.

OPTIONS:

    --out, -o <path>      File to write output to. Defaults to '<source>.brson'

                          output .brson files to this directory.
    --project-directory, -d <path>

    --pack-to <format>    The format to pack to: 'moduprint' (default). The

    --watch               Will watch the ProtoGraph file for changes and

    --glob                Interpret the source files using glob patterns

    --stop-after-resolve  Stop the compilation after the ProtoGraph program has
                          been lowered into components (IR). All compiler

                          they are easier to parse for an IDE. They will be

    --layout-engine <builtin|graphviz>
                          Engine to use to layout ProtoFlux nodes. 'builtin'
                          using the GraphShape libary and 'graphviz' (default).
    --skip-restore        Do not restore package dependencies. Only build. Only
                          applies if a protograph.toml file is in the root of
                          the project.
    --profile <string>    Compiler build profiles. fast, dev, release, and
                          allUnsafe are included by default. If not specified,
                          dev is used.
    --optimization-preset <fast|dev|release|allunstable>
                          Apply a different optimization preset than normal
    --optimization, -O=<string>
                          Comma separated list of compiler optimizations to
                          perform. Prefix an optimization with 'no' to disable
                          it. Overrides the profile optimizations.
    --no-default-assets   Do not include default assets in the packed record.
                          This includes the slot templates, heap and various
                          dynamic variables.
    --skip-unmodified, -S Don't recompile source files if they and all of their
                          dependencies have not changed. This will NOT
                          recompile modules that have errors unless they have
                          been modified.
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stderr:
USAGE: flux-sdk clean [--help] [--project-directory <path>] [--project-packages]
                      [--global-packages]

OPTIONS:

    --project-directory, -d <path>
                          Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
                          modules will be resolved. The current directory by
                          default.
    --project-packages    Delete the package links in the .pg-packages
                          directory in this project
    --global-packages     Delete ALL the packages in the global package
                          directory. Warning: this may break other projects on
                          this machines that will need to be restored.
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: flux-sdk clean [--help] [--project-directory <path>] [--project-packages]
                      [--global-packages]

OPTIONS:

    --project-directory, -d <path>
                          Root directory of the ProtoGraph project from which
                          modules will be resolved. The current directory by
                          default.
    --project-packages    Delete the package links in the .pg-packages
                          directory in this project
    --global-packages     Delete ALL the packages in the global package
                          directory. Warning: this may break other projects on
                          this machines that will need to be restored.
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stderr:
USAGE: flux-sdk lsp [--help] [--library-path <path>]
                    [--log-directory <directory>] [--log-level <level>]
                    [--code-share <port>]

OPTIONS:

    --library-path, -L <path>
                          Manually specify a directory to search for the
                          ProtoFlux DLLs at runtime for reflection. You an also
                          set the RESONITE_MANAGED_DATA_PATH environment
                          variable instead of specifying this command line
                          argument. Use this if your Resonite files are
                          installed in a non-standard location or you want to
                          use a different set of DLLs.
    --log-directory <directory>
                          Output logs generated by the server to a logging
                          directory. Log files will be created there and new
                          files will be created on an hourly rolling interval.
    --log-level <level>   The level to log at [Verbose; Debug; Information;
                          Warning; Error; Fatal]. This applies for logging to
                          the client as well as file logging if enabled with
                          the log directory argument.
    --code-share <port>   Enable code sharing from the LSP on the address
                          ws://127.0.0.1:<port>/notify
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: flux-sdk lsp [--help] [--library-path <path>]
                    [--log-directory <directory>] [--log-level <level>]
                    [--code-share <port>]

OPTIONS:

    --library-path, -L <path>
                          Manually specify a directory to search for the
                          ProtoFlux DLLs at runtime for reflection. You an also

    --log-directory <directory>

                          directory. Log files will be created there and new
                          files will be created on an hourly rolling interval.
    --log-level <level>   The level to log at [Verbose; Debug; Information;
                          Warning; Error; Fatal]. This applies for logging to
                          the client as well as file logging if enabled with
                          the log directory argument.
    --code-share <port>   Enable code sharing from the LSP on the address
                          ws://127.0.0.1:<port>/notify
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stderr:
USAGE: flux-sdk style [--help] [--out-dir <path>] [--language <language>]
                      [<path>...]

SOURCE:

    <path>...             Source files to style. Can be multiple files and/or
                          glob pattern. The files will have the .txt appended
                          to the end of the current file name.

OPTIONS:

    --out-dir <path>      Directory to which to store the output files.
                          Defaults to the current directory.
    --language <language> The language ID to specify the source language.
                          Defaults to styling ProtoGraph.
    --help                display this list of options.

                          Defaults to styling ProtoGraph.
    --help                display this list of options.
